title: Release Date Announced! Lunarium Launches on July 29, 2026 ✨
contents_preview: The moment we've been waiting for is finally here —Lunarium will officially launch on July 29, 2026!If Lunarium has been waiting on your wishlist for a while, thank you for your patience.We would also like to thank everyone who has followed Lunarium, participated in our playtests, supported us, and

title: Steam Broadcast Now Live During Nordic Game!
contents_preview: The Steam broadcast for Lunarium is now live during Nordic Game — come stop by and check it out!Don’t forget to wishlist Lunarium — Ave and Lune will be meeting everyone very soon. Thank you all for your support!

title: Lunarium Heads to the Nordics Next Week!
contents_preview: A game called Lunarium was always meant to travel north.From Boston to Kyoto, and now beneath the Nordic sky it finally feels like we’re setting off on a true journey among the stars. ✨Next week, Lunarium will be showcased in Sweden for the first time at Nordic Game.Exhibition Dates: May 26 – May 29

title: Live Stream Now Available During BitSummit!
contents_preview: Lunarium is now live on Steam during BitSummit!Feel free to stop by the stream and check out gameplay footage and game showcases while the event is happening. If you're following BitSummit, we’d love for you to take a look at our stream as well!

title: Come experience Lunarium at BitSummit Kyoto!
contents_preview: We’re excited to announce that Star Journey will be attending BitSummit in Kyoto next week!This will be our second time showcasing the game in Japan following TGS 2025. We’ve also prepared lots of cute goodies for visitors this time, so feel free to stop by, try the game, and pick up some exclusive

title: Come and have a look during the Steam Medieval Festival!
contents_preview: We have a live-stream during The Steam Medieval Fest~ Come and have a look~

title: Lunarium is Heading to PAX East!
contents_preview: Hi everyone! We’re excited and honored to share that Lunarium will be showcasing at PAX East this week—one of the most influential gaming conventions in North America. This also marks our very first time exhibiting in the North American market, and we hope to connect with even more players there!P.S

title: Some attempts we have made to optimize the gaming experience
contents_preview: Dear players, hello everyone, since the demo of Lunarium was launched, we have received a lot of enthusiastic gameplay and feedback from players, and we are very grateful. title: Watch developers play the Lunarium Demo!
contents_preview: Try our demo for free! If you like it, please add our game to your wish list! It would be even better if you could leave a positive review, which is a huge encouragement for us!

title: 0.4.5Beta Demo Patch Notes
contents_preview: This update represents a more polished version of the demo, with significant improvements to localization implementation. title: Nice to meet you. We are Lunarium Studio！
contents_preview: Hello everyone, we are Lunarium Studio! We're thrilled to present our first sandbox-style fantasy action-adventure game "Star Journey" on Steam.
